dashboard.title: Recent Projects
dashboard.subtitle: Select a project to analyze or start a new one

analyzeDialog.title: Analyze New Project
analyzeDialog.subtitle: Choose how to upload your project for analysis
analyzeDialog.gitUrlRequired: Please enter a Git repository URL.
analyzeDialog.placeholder: Add a name for your project
analyzeDialog.dropzoneText: Drag and drop a .zip file or click to browse
analyzeDialog.langRequired: Please select at least one language.

editRepoDialog.title: Edit Project
editRepoDialog.subtitle: Change the name and color of your project
editRepoDialog.saveFailed: Failed to save. Please try again.
editRepoDialog.deleteWarning: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? It will be permanently removed from your projects.
editRepoDialog.deleteFailed: Failed to delete. Please try again.

project.analysisRunningText: Your repository is currently being analyzed. This process may include parsing files, building graphs, and generating summaries. The status is refreshed automatically.

import.loadingText: We're setting up the shared project for you. This will only take a moment.
import.errorText: We couldn't import this project. The link may be invalid or the project may no longer be available.

analysis.historyEmpty: Your analysis history will appear here once you start exploring your code.
analysis.exploreSubheading: Get insights about architecture, implementation, and code structure
analysis.chatWelcome: Hello! I'm your code assistant. Ask me anything about the implementation, architecture, or specific code files.
analysis.askPlaceholder: Ask a question about your code...
analysis.chatError: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.
analysis.suggestion1: What is the overall architecture of this project?
analysis.suggestion2: How does the authentication system work?
analysis.suggestion3: What are the main dependencies and why were they chosen?
analysis.suggestion4: How is the state management implemented?
analysis.suggestion5: What testing strategy is in place?
analysis.suggestion6: How can I add a new feature to this codebase?
analysis.deepAnalysisDialogDescription: Run a thorough analysis of your project. The AI will deeply examine your codebase and generate a detailed PDF report that you can download once it's ready.
analysis.deepAnalysisQueryLabel: What would you like to analyze?
analysis.deepAnalysisQueryPlaceholder: e.g., Analyze the security vulnerabilities and suggest improvements...
analysis.deepAnalysisEmptyDesc: Start a deep analysis to get detailed reports about your codebase.

graphExplorer.title: Interactive Project Explorer
graphExplorer.subtitle: Select a file and graph type to explore its structure
graphExplorer.selectFilePrompt: Select a file to explore its graph
graphExplorer.loadFailed: Failed to load graph data. Please try again.
graphExplorer.noFileSelected: No file selected. Select a file to explore its graph.
graphExplorer.legacyFormat: This project was analyzed with an older graph format. A newer version is available - re-upload it as a new project to regenerate the graphs.

fileSourceViewer.title: Source code
fileSourceViewer.loadFailed: Failed to load file source. Please try again.
fileSourceViewer.docLoadFailed: Failed to load documentation. Please try again.

auth.sessionExpiredMessage: Your session has expired. You will be reconnected automatically.

devBanner.message: This project is still under development. Data may be deleted at any time.
